content.en:
As time passed, another 100,000 years passed.

this day.

The Soul Saint Realm Flower has finally matured!

At the moment when the Soul Saint Realm Flower matured, a Supreme Domain Ancestor made a move.

At the same time, outside the Soul Saint Realm, the aura of the powerful and powerful domain ancestors emerged, tearing through the world barriers one by one and entering the Soul Saint Realm.

These Supreme Domain Ancestors all rushed towards the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and they all wanted to snatch the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian yelled coldly.

Immediately, he unleashed the Spatial Sacred Technique, Void Slash, and slashed at those Supreme Domain Ancestors with one blow.

Originally, Ye Tian's single blow couldn't kill a few Supreme Domain Ancestors, after all, the Void Slash was not a large-scale attack holy technique, but many Supreme Domain Ancestors underestimated Ye Tian, and only urged the Defense Saint Relics and Defense Domain Technique, and continued to rush towards the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

Coupled with the impact of those countless black shadows, the strength they exerted was reduced a lot.

Moreover, Ye Tian's attack is not weak.

As a result, a famous and powerful domain ancestor was beheaded and killed.

In an instant, dozens of Supreme Domain Ancestors fell, and several extremely powerful Supreme Domain Ancestors were also injured, and they didn't dare to rush towards the Soul Saint Realm Flower again, otherwise their souls would be torn apart by the black shadow, and it would be over.

"How could the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws be so powerful?"

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors were shocked.

Some of these Supreme Domain Ancestors were also Holy Sons in the past, and their talents were also extremely powerful, and their combat effectiveness was very strong.

And even if Ye Tian is a saint endowment, he is not a supreme domain ancestor now, he is just a top domain ancestor, and he can kill so many supreme domain ancestors with one blow, this is too exaggerated!

The True Spirit Domain Ancestor and the Hundred Cold Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate also showed solemn expressions, although on the surface, the strength displayed by Ye Tian could not threaten them, but they were indeed qualified to fight them.

The key is that they are already at the peak of the strongest domain ancestor, and Ye Tiancai is at the peak of the top domain ancestor, and the gap between the two sides is a big realm!

"Wicked!"

True Spirit Domain Ancestor and Hundred Cold Domain Ancestor secretly said.

Seeing that Ye Tian's strength was not simple, they didn't immediately snatch the Soul Saint Realm Flower, they were still watching.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian stood not far from the Soul Saint Realm Flower, the number of black shadows here was not very large, and he could still bear it.

It's not that he doesn't want to take the Soul Saint Realm Flower immediately, but once he goes to pick the Soul Saint Realm Flower, if many other Supreme Domain Ancestors attack him, he will be a little dangerous, after all, the place where the Soul Saint Realm Flower is located has countless black shadows, and once it is attacked by the outside world, it will be very dangerous.

So, he had to be careful.

At this time, he didn't want to expose the fact that he could control the Xuanxu Saint Realm to exert dozens of times his combat power, after all, this was his biggest hole card.

If you don't have to expose such hole cards to solve this matter perfectly, it is naturally the best choice.

Unless he is in a desperate situation, he will reveal this secret.

Whoa!!!

An extremely powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor appeared here, but he didn't make an immediate move.

Among them, there are also some Supreme Domain Ancestors with special domain weapons, changing their aura and appearance, as if they are deliberately hiding their true identities.

After all, they didn't want to offend Ye Tian either.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, you better get out of the way, your strength is indeed very strong, but you still can't compete with so many of our Supreme Domain Ancestors, the Soul Saint Realm Flower is too precious, you can't keep it!" said a Supreme Domain Ancestor.

This Supreme Domain Ancestor has hidden his appearance and aura, so no one knows his identity.

But his kind of hiding in Ye Tian's eyes is nothing, Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe it, and he knew his identity.

"Mullet Domain Ancestor, what else are you hiding, if you dare to snatch it, then do it, it's no problem for me to kill you!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You...... How do you know my identity?"

He hides his aura and appearance like this, even the invincible domain ancestor is difficult to see through, and no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, he is only a top domain ancestor, and he can't see through his disguise at all!

At this time, many Supreme Domain Ancestors were hesitating, should they go up?

However, they also knew that Ye Tian's strength was very strong, otherwise they would not be able to kill dozens of Supreme Domain Ancestors in an instant.

If the Holy Endowed of the Supreme Domain Ancestor Peak Realm is classified as the first grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, then the peak of the Supreme Domain Ancestor achieved by the top Holy Son is classified as the second grade, the peak powerhouse of the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the ordinary Holy Son level is the third grade, and the ordinary genius is the fourth grade.

Then, Ye Tian's current strength was enough to be classified as the third grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

The second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor basically has a great degree of confidence in being promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, but the third-grade Invincible Domain Ancestor has no certainty of being promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, so he is eager to obtain the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

This time, there were almost no second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, and the strongest ones were only very close to the second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors.

For example, the True Spirit Domain Ancestor is the strongest domain ancestor who belongs to the third grade, and Ye Tian also belongs to the third grade of combat power.

The Mullet Saint Son also barely belonged to the third grade, but his combat power was slightly weaker than Ye Tian.

"Let's go together, first hit the Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, and then go to snatch the Soul Saint Realm Flower, and then see their respective abilities!"

The Mullet Domain Ancestor proposed.

He wasn't afraid of Ye Tian, but he didn't think that Ye Tian really had the ability to kill him.

Rumble!!!!

The thirteen third-rank Supreme Domain Ancestors all shot together, and at the same time, there were hundreds of fourth-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors, such a force was enough to severely damage or even kill any third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, and only the second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors had any hope of confronting these Supreme Domain Ancestors.

At this moment, Ye Tian's replica body appeared.

The fact that he has a special clone has long been spread in this mountain realm, so it is not a secret.

I saw that the copy body appeared with the Forbidden Yuan Blade in his hand, and as soon as it appeared, he directly cast the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and burst out with a full force attack comparable to that of the second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Bang!!!!!

A Supreme Domain Ancestor was shocked into the air, and at the same time, Ye Tian's body performed the Divine Suppression Technique, aiming at one of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, Mullet and Ancestor.

Ye Tian wanted to kill a third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor in order to deter other Supreme Domain Ancestors.

"Ah!!!h

The Mullet Domain Ancestor suffered a blow from the Divine Technique, and his soul was shaken, as if it had been torn apart.

And at this time, Ye Tian cast another terrifying holy technique on it—the Eternal Holy Technique!

At this time, the Mullet Domain Ancestor was frozen in time, and the whole person was frozen, and even his thinking was frozen.

And at the moment when the Mullet Domain Ancestor was frozen, Ye Tian tore his body with a false slash, and the duplicate body held the Forbidden Yuan Blade to deliver a fatal blow.

If the Mullet Domain Ancestor is not affected by the Time Sacred Technique, he can also urge the life-saving thing.

But he was affected by the Time Divine Technique, which was equivalent to completely giving up urging the life-saving thing, so he had no power to resist.

Burst!!!!

The body of the ancestor of the Mullet Domain collapsed, his soul was annihilated, and he completely fell and died.

And all this was only done in an instant, and it wasn't until the fall of the Mullet Domain Ancestor that the other Supreme Domain Ancestors reacted.
